info.title: Reisetagebuch API Draft
info.description: This is a draft version of the Reisetagebuch API documentation. The API is still under development and may change in future releases. Use at your own risk!

get.description: Get account details

mustVerifyEmail.description: Indicates if the user must verify their email address

traewellingConnected.description: Indicates if the user has connected their Traewelling account

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user

post.description: Authenticate a user and return an access token
Register a new user and return an access token

invite.description: Optional invite code required if open registration is disabled

post.description: Logout the authenticated user by revoking their access token
Send a password reset link to the user's email address
Reset the user's password using the provided token and new password

put.description: Update the authenticated user's password by providing the current password and a new password

post.description: Verify the user's email address using the provided verification link parameters
Resend the email verification link to the authenticated user if their email address is not yet verified

get.description: Validate an invite code and return information about the invite if it is valid

valid.description: Indicates whether the invite code is valid

invitedBy.description: The name of the user who created the invite, or null if the inviter user no longer exists

get.description: Return the users, that follow a user
Return the users, that a user follows

post.description: Create a follow relationship between two users

400.description: Bad request, e.g. when trying to follow yourself

403.description: Forbidden, e.g. when trying to follow on behalf of another user

404.description: Not found, e.g. when the user or target user does not exist

delete.description: Delete a follow relationship between two users

403.description: Forbidden, e.g. when trying to follow on behalf of another user

404.description: Not found, e.g. when the user or target user does not exist

put.description: Approve a follow request between two users

400.description: Bad request, e.g. when trying to follow yourself

403.description: Forbidden, e.g. when trying to follow on behalf of another user

404.description: Not found, e.g. when the user or target user does not exist

post.description: Create a follow request between two users

400.description: Bad request, e.g. when trying to follow yourself

403.description: Forbidden, e.g. when trying to follow on behalf of another user

404.description: Not found, e.g. when the user or target user does not exist

delete.description: Delete a follow request between two users

403.description: Forbidden, e.g. when trying to follow on behalf of another user

404.description: Not found, e.g. when the user or target user does not exist

get.description: List invite codes for the authenticated user
Get users who liked a post
Prefetch location data and optionally store user history
Return a recent location matching the requested coordinates
Search for locations near a point or by query
Geocode a query using configured providers
Return location history for the authenticated user for a given day
Return departures for a given point or station identifier
Return stopovers for a given trip start
Get a LineString geometry between two locations
Get stop points between two locations as MultiPoint geometry
List notifications for authenticated user
Get unread notifications count
Returns paginated posts for the authenticated user timeline
Returns paginated posts for the authenticated user / global public timeline

get.summary: Get posts for a specific user
get.description: Returns paginated posts for a specific user
Returns post data

patch.description: Update a post (text, transport or location)

get.description: Returns filtered posts

parameters.name: travelReason
parameters.description: Filter by travel reason (e.g., WORK, LEISURE)

put.description: Update transport-specific fields of a post
Update transport times for a transport post

post.description: Upload a GPX or GeoJSON track file for a transport post

delete.description: Remove the uploaded track from a transport post

get.summary: Redirects the user to Traewelling for OAuth authentication

url.description: The URL to redirect the user to for Traewelling authentication

401.description: Unauthorized - user must be authenticated to connect Traewelling account

get.summary: Handles the callback from Traewelling after OAuth authentication

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The authorization code returned by Traewelling after successful authentication

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The state parameter to prevent CSRF attacks (optional)

500.description: Internal Server Error - failed to connect Traewelling account

get.description: Return GeoJSON map data for a user
Return profile data for a user

featureFlags.description: List of feature flags and their statuses

AuthenticatedUserDto.title: Authenticated User DTO
AuthenticatedUserDto.description: Data Transfer Object representing the authenticated user

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

name.description: The full name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

avatar.description: The URL of the user avatar image

mustVerifyEmail.description: Indicates whether the user must verify their email address

canInviteUsers.description: Indicates whether the user has permission to invite other users

traewellingConnected.description: Indicates whether the user has connected their Traewelling account

DeparturesDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Departures at a Stop

DeparturesResponseDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Departures Response

modes.description: Filter modes applied to the request

requestTime.description: Time when the request was made

enabled.description: Indicates if the feature flag is enabled

items.description: Array of post items on the current page

likedByUser.description: Indicates if the post is liked by the user

likeCount.description: Total number of likes on the post

LocationHistoryDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Location History

AreaDto.description: Data Transfer Object for an Area in the Motis API

matched.description: Indicates if the area was matched to a known location

unique.description: Indicates if the area is unique (not shared with other locations)

default.description: Indicates if the area is a default area (used when no specific area is matched)

tokens.description: An array of tokens representing parts of the location name or identifier

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the location

level.description: The level or floor of the location, if applicable

street.description: The street name of the location, if applicable

houseNumber.description: The house number of the location, if applicable

zip.description: The ZIP code of the location, if applicable

areas.description: An array of area names or identifiers associated with the location

score.description: The confidence score of the geocode result

LegDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Leg of a Trip in the Motis API

duration.description: Duration of the leg in seconds

startTime.description: Start time of the leg, if available

endTime.description: End time of the leg, if available

scheduledStartTime.description: Scheduled start time of the leg, if available

scheduledEndTime.description: Scheduled end time of the leg, if available

realTime.description: Indicates if the times are real-time or scheduled

headSign.description: Head sign for the leg, if available

agencyName.description: Name of the agency associated with this leg, if available

agencyId.description: Identifier for the agency associated with this leg, if available

tripId.description: Identifier for the trip associated with this leg

routeShortName.description: Short name for the route, if available

routeLongName.description: Long name for the route, if available

tripShortName.description: Short name for the trip, if available

displayName.description: Display name for the leg, if available

routeColor.description: Color for the route, if available

routeTextColor.description: Text color for the route, if available

intermediateStops.description: List of intermediate stops for the leg, if available

MotisStopDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Stop

distance.description: Distance to the stop in meters

StopPlaceDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Stop Place in the Motis API

arrival.description: Actual arrival time at the stop place, if available

departure.description: Actual departure time from the stop place, if available

scheduledArrival.description: Scheduled arrival time at the stop place

scheduledDeparture.description: Scheduled departure time from the stop place

cancelled.description: Indicates if the stop place is cancelled

StopTimeDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Stop Time in the Motis API

realTime.description: Indicates if the stop time is based on real-time data

headSign.description: Head sign for the stop time, if available

agencyName.description: Name of the agency associated with this stop time, if available

agencyId.description: Identifier for the agency associated with this stop time, if available

tripId.description: Identifier for the trip associated with this stop time

routeShortName.description: Short name for the route, if available

routeLongName.description: Long name for the route, if available

tripShortName.description: Short name for the trip, if available

routeColor.description: Color for the route, if available

routeTextColor.description: Text color for the route, if available

displayName.description: Display name for the stop time, if available

source.description: Source of the stop time information

MotisTripDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Trip in the Motis API

duration.description: Total duration of the trip in seconds

transfers.description: Number of transfers during the trip

legs.description: List of legs that make up the trip

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was last updated

readAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was read

data.description: Additional data associated with the notification

PostLikedData.description: Data for a post liked notification

postBody.description: Body content of the liked post

likedByUserId.description: ID of the user who liked the post

likedByUserName.description: Username of the user who liked the post

likedByUserDisplayName.description: Display name of the user who liked the post

likedByUserAvatarUrl.description: Avatar URL of the user who liked the post

postSummary.description: Optional summary of the liked post

TraewellingCrosspostFailedData.description: Data for a traewelling crosspost failed notification

errorMessage.description: Error message describing the reason for the crosspost failure

UserFollowedData.description: Data for a user followed notification

followerUserId.description: ID of the user who followed you

followerUserName.description: Username of the user who followed you

followerUserDisplayName.description: Display name of the user who followed you

followerUserAvatarUrl.description: Avatar URL of the user who followed you

UserRequestedFollowData.description: Data for a user requested follow notification

followerUserId.description: ID of the user who followed you

followerUserName.description: Username of the user who followed you

followerUserDisplayName.description: Display name of the user who followed you

followerUserAvatarUrl.description: Avatar URL of the user who followed you

items.description: Array of post items on the current page

RequestLocationDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Request Location

updatedAt.description: Last update time of the request location data

lastRequestedAt.description: Last time a request was made for location data

StopoversResponseDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Stopovers Response

TokenResponseDto.title: Authenticated User Token DTO
TokenResponseDto.description: Data Transfer Object representing the authenticated user

token.description: The access token for the authenticated user

expiresAt.description: The expiration time of the token

TripCreationResponseDto.description: Data Transfer Object for Trip Creation Response

tripId.description: The identifier of the created trip (foreign trip id)

startId.description: The identifier of the starting location of the trip

startTime.description: The departure time of the trip in ISO 8601 format

UserSettingsDto.title: User Settings DTO
UserSettingsDto.description: Data Transfer Object representing user settings

motisRadius.description: Radius for Motis suggestions in meters

TravelReason.description: Reasons for travel associated with transport posts

ProfileUpdateRequest.title: Profile Update Request
ProfileUpdateRequest.description: Request schema for updating user profile information

name.description: The full name of the user

username.description: The unique username for the user (lowercase, alphanumeric, dashes, and underscores only)

email.description: The email address of the user (lowercase)

motisRadius.description: Radius for Motis suggestions in meters (allowed values: 50, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500)

expires_at.description: The expiration date of the invite code

mode.description: The mode of transport for the trip.

routeLongName.description: The long name of the route.

tripShortName.description: The short name of the trip.

displayName.description: The display name of the trip.

origin.description: The origin location of the trip.

originType.description: The type of identifier used for the origin (id or identifier).

destination.description: The destination location of the trip.

destinationType.description: The type of identifier used for the destination (id or identifier).

departureTime.description: The departure time of the trip.

arrivalTime.description: The arrival time of the trip.

stops.description: An array of stops for the trip.

identifierType.description: The type of identifier used for the stop (id or identifier).

order.description: The order of the stop in the trip sequence.

stopId.description: The ID of the transport trip stop, the user wants to exit at.

manualDepartureTime.description: The manually set departure time for the transport post.

manualArrivalTime.description: The manually set arrival time for the transport post.

TransportTrackUploadRequest.description: Request to upload a GPX or GeoJSON track file

id.description: The unique identifier of the invite code

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp of the invite code

expiresAt.description: The expiration timestamp of the invite code

usedAt.description: The timestamp when the invite code was used

distance.description: Distance to the location in meters

LocationHistoryEntryDto.description: Location History Entry Data Transfer Object

type.description: Type of the location history entry

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the location history entry in ISO 8601 format

hashTags.description: List of hashtags associated with the post

likesCount.description: Number of likes on the post

likedByUser.description: Indicates if the post is liked by the current user

metaInfos.description: Additional meta information associated with the post

travelReason.description: Reason for travel associated with the location post

manualDepartureTime.description: Manually specified departure time in ISO 8601 format

manualArrivalTime.description: Manually specified arrival time in ISO 8601 format

travelReason.description: Reason for travel associated with the transport post

duration.description: Duration of the trip in seconds

StopDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Transport Trip Stop

arrivalTime.description: Scheduled arrival time in ISO 8601 format

departureTime.description: Scheduled departure time in ISO 8601 format

TripDto.description: Data Transfer Object for a Transport Trip

routeColor.description: Color of the route in HEX format

routeTextColor.description: Text color of the route in HEX format

TripHistoryEntryDto.description: Trip History Entry Data Transfer Object

geometry.description: Geometry of the trip as a GeoJSON LineString

avatar.description: URL of the user avatar image

header.description: URL of the user header image

isFollowed.description: Indicates if the current user is following this user

isFollowRequested.description: Indicates if the current user has requested to follow this user

requiresFollowRequest.description: Indicates if following this user requires approval

postsCount.description: Total number of posts by the user

transportPostsCount.description: Number of transport-related posts by the user

locationPostsCount.description: Number of location-related posts by the user

followersCount.description: Number of followers the user has

followingCount.description: Number of users the user is following

travelledDistance.description: Total distance travelled by the user in meters

travelledDuration.description: Total duration of travel by the user in seconds

visitedCountriesCount.description: Number of distinct countries visited by the user

visitedLocationsCount.description: Number of distinct locations visited by the user

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Operations related to posts created by users
